name: OpenIPAHound 25 Research - RBAC Permission Triage
description: Expands FreeIPA RBAC paths from principals to permission objects so unusual IPA directory permissions can be inspected. These are structural RBAC chains, not generic LDAP-write abuse edges.
query:
MATCH p=(principal)-[:IPA_MemberOf|IPA_HasRole|IPA_HasPrivilege|IPA_ContainsPermission*1..6]->(permission:IPA_Permission)
WHERE principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group OR principal:IPA_Service OR principal:IPA_Computer
RETURN p,
       coalesce(principal.uid, principal.cn, principal.principal, principal.fqdn) AS principal_name,
       permission.cn AS permission_name,
       permission.rights AS rights,
       permission.target AS target,
       permission.targetfilters AS target_filters
LIMIT 1000
